<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272733423 space=MT version=1 -->
## PAGE 04216: (2026x) UAF 1.1 to UAF 1.2. Changes in diagrams, tables, and matrices

- page_id: `272733423`
- space_key: `MT`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/MT/pages/272733423/2026x+UAF+1.1+to+UAF+1.2.+Changes+in+diagrams+tables+and+matrices
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-25T13:42:24.996+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x) Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x) UAF 1.3 modeling > (2026x) Migration User Guides > (2026x) UAF projects migration manual > (2026x) Migration from UAF 1.1 to UAF 1.2
- labels: ['msosa']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

New diagrams, tables, and matrices:

- Architecture Management diagram
- Security Controls diagram
- Security Constraints table
- Services Role-based Connectivity Table
- Services Connectivity Table
- Services Connectivity Matrix
- Strategic Constraint table
- Strategic Information diagram
- Strategic Motivation diagram
- Strategic Processes
- Functions to Operational Activities Matrix
- Actual Responsible Resources to Actual Project Mapping Matrix

The following table shows how the tables, diagrams, and matrices were renamed consistent with the UAF 1.2 support.

| Name in UAF 1.1 | Name in UAF 1.2 |
| --- | --- |
| Capabilities to Actual Enduring Tasks Mapping Matrix | Actual Strategic Phases to Capabilities Mapping Matrix |
| Service Specifications to Capabilities Mapping matrix | Services to Capabilities Mapping matrix |
| Operational Activities to Service Specifications Mapping matrix | Services to Operational Activities Mapping matrix |
| Services to Operational Activities Mapping matrix | Services to Operational Activity Traceability Matrix |
| Operational Interaction Scenarios | Operational Sequences |
| Services Interaction Scenarios | Services Sequences |
| Personnel Interaction Scenarios | Personnel Sequences |
| Resources Interaction Scenarios | Resources Sequences |
| Operational Interaction Scenarios BPD | Operational Sequences BPD |
| Personnel Interaction Scenarios BPD | Personnel Sequences BPD |
| Resources Interaction Scenarios BPD | Resources Sequences BPD |
| Conceptual Data Model | Strategic Information |
| Logical Data Model | Operational Information |
| Physical Data Model | Resources Information |
| Actual Enterprise Phases Gantt Chart | Actual Strategic Phases Gantt Chart |

Updated diagrams, tables, and matrices:

| Name | Note |
| --- | --- |
| SvcV-3b Services-Services Matrix | In UAF 1.2, Associations were changed to Service Exchanges |
| Implementation matrix | The Implements relationship is available between the following client and supplier pairs:Resource Performer and Operational AgentFunction and Operational Activity or Service FunctionResource Interface and Service Interface or Operational InterfaceResource Connector and Operational Connector or Resource ConnectorResource Exchange and Operational ExchangeResource Role and Operational RoleResource Information and Operational informationArchitecture or Operational Activity and Actual Strategic PhaseResource Service and ServiceOperational Information and Strategic Information |
| SV-9 Systems Technology and Skills ForecastSvcV-9 Services Technology and Skills ForecastStdV-2 Standards ForecastNSV-9 Technology ForecastNTV-2 Technical Standards ForecastSV-9 Technology & Skills ForecastTV-2 Standards ForecastP1 Resource Types Technology ForecastA8 Standards ForecastStandards RoadmapResources ForecastPersonnel Forecast | It is possible to add the Actual Strategic Phase as a column in the table.In the 3rd step of the wizard, you can select Actual Strategic Phases. |
| Actual Responsible Resources to Actual Projects Mapping MatrixLr Responsibility MatrixAcV-1 Responsibility MatrixPV-1 Responsibility MatrixNPV-1 Responsibility Matrix | The row scope was changed from Actual Organizational Resources to Actual Responsible Resources. |
| Actual Resources Taxonomy Matrix | The row scope was changed from Actual Organizational Resources to Actual Responsible Resources. |
| Resources to Operational Activities Mapping Matrix | The dependency criterion was changed. |
| Operational Activity to Services Traceability | The dependency criterion was changed. |
| SV-5b Operational Activity to Systems Traceability Matrix | The dependency criterion was changed. |
| SvcV-3b Services-Services Matrix | The dependency criterion was changed. |
| UPDM Capability Behavioral Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Capability Structural Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Implementation Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Operational Activity Decomposition Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Operational Activity Implementation Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Operational Performer Impact Analysis Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Organization Structure Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |
| UPDM Resource Performer Map | The dependency criterion name was changed. |

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<p class="auto-cursor-target">New diagrams, tables, and matrices:</p><ul><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Architecture Management diagram</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Security Controls diagram</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Security Constraints table</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target">Services Role-based Connectivity Table</li><li class="auto-cursor-target">Services Connectivity Table</li><li class="auto-cursor-target">Services Connectivity Matrix</li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Strategic Constraint table</span></span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Strategic Information diagram</span></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Strategic Motivation diagram</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Strategic Processes</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">Functions to Operational Activities Matrix</span></li><li class="auto-cursor-target"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> Actual Responsible Resources to Actual Project Mapping Matrix</span></li></ul><p><br /></p><p>The following table shows how the tables, diagrams, and matrices were renamed consistent with the UAF 1.2 support.</p><table class="relative-table" style="width: 52.2765%;"><colgroup><col style="width: 54.4183%;" /><col style="width: 45.5817%;" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th style="text-align: center;">Name in UAF 1.1</th><th style="text-align: center;">Name in UAF 1.2</th></tr><tr><td>Capabilities to Actual Enduring Tasks Mapping Matrix</td><td>Actual Strategic Phases to Capabilities Mapping Matrix</td></tr><tr><td>Service Specifications to Capabilities Mapping matrix</td><td>Services to Capabilities Mapping matrix</td></tr><tr><td>Operational Activities to Service Specifications Mapping matrix</td><td>Services to Operational Activities Mapping matrix</td></tr><tr><td>Services to Operational Activities Mapping matrix</td><td>Services to Operational Activity Traceability Matrix</td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Operational Interaction Scenarios</span></td><td>Operational Sequences</td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Services Interaction Scenarios</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Services Sequences</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Interaction Scenarios</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Sequences</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Interaction Scenarios</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Sequences</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Operational Interaction Scenarios BPD</span></td><td><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Operational Sequences BPD</span></p></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Interaction Scenarios BPD</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Sequences BPD</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Interaction Scenarios BPD</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Sequences BPD</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Conceptual Data Model</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Strategic Information</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Logical Data Model</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Operational Information</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Physical Data Model</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Information</span></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Actual Enterprise Phases Gantt Chart</span></td><td>Actual Strategic Phases Gantt Chart</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>Updated diagrams, tables, and matrices:</p><table class="relative-table" style="width: 60.0658%;"><colgroup><col style="width: 44.9717%;" /><col style="width: 55.0283%;" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th>Name</th><th>Note</th></tr><tr><td>SvcV-3b Services-Services Matrix</td><td><ul><li>In UAF 1.2, Associations were changed to Service Exchanges</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td>Implementation matrix</td><td><p>The Implements relationship is available between the following client and supplier pairs:</p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Resource Performer and Operational Agent</li><li>Function and Operational Activity or Service Function</li><li>Resource Interface and Service Interface or Operational Interface</li><li>Resource Connector and Operational Connector or Resource Connector</li><li>Resource Exchange and Operational Exchange</li><li>Resource Role and Operational Role</li><li>Resource Information and Operational information</li><li>Architecture or Operational Activity and Actual Strategic Phase</li><li>Resource Service and Service</li><li>Operational Information and Strategic Information</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">SV-9 Systems Technology and Skills Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">SvcV-9 Services Technology and Skills Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">StdV-2 Standards Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">NSV-9 Technology Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">NTV-2 Technical Standards Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">SV-9 Technology &amp; Skills Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">TV-2 Standards Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">P1 Resource Types Technology Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A8 Standards Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Standards Roadmap</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Forecast</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Forecast</span></li></ul></td><td><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>It is possible to add the Actual Strategic Phase as a column in the table.</li><li>In the 3rd step of the wizard, you can select Actual Strategic Phases.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Actual Responsible Resources to Actual Projects Mapping Matrix</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Lr Responsibility Matrix</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">AcV-1 Responsibility Matrix</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">PV-1 Responsibility Matrix</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">NPV-1 Responsibility Matrix</span></li></ul></td><td><ul><li>The row scope was changed from Actual Organizational Resources to Actual Responsible Resources.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Actual Resources Taxonomy Matrix</span></td><td><ul><li>The row scope was changed from Actual Organizational Resources to Actual Responsible Resources.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources to Operational Activities Mapping Matrix</span></td><td><ul><li>The dependency criterion was changed.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Operational Activity to Services Traceability</span></td><td><ul><li>The dependency criterion was changed.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">SV-5b Operational Activity to Systems Traceability Matrix</span></td><td><ul><li>The dependency criterion was changed.</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">SvcV-3b Services-Services Matrix</span></td><td><ul><li>The dependency criterion was ## PAGE 04217: (2026x) UAF 1.1 to UAF 1.2. Changes of element metaclass and type
````

- page_id: `272733403`
- space_key: `MT`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/MT/pages/272733403/2026x+UAF+1.1+to+UAF+1.2.+Changes+of+element+metaclass+and+type
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-25T13:42:22.958+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x) Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x) UAF 1.3 modeling > (2026x) Migration User Guides > (2026x) UAF projects migration manual > (2026x) Migration from UAF 1.1 to UAF 1.2
- labels: ['msosa']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

The following table describes element metaclasses mapping between UAF 1.1 and UAF 1.2.

| Element | UAF 1.1 [Metaclass] | UAF 1.2 [Metaclass] |
| --- | --- | --- |
| WholeLifeEnterprise | Class | InstanceSpecification |

###### Changes types of Elements

The following table describes element metaclasses mapping between UAF 1.1 and UAF 1.2.

| Element/Property | UAF 1.1 [Type] | UAF 1.2 [Type] |
| --- | --- | --- |
| EnterpriseGoal::benefit | String | ValueItem |

For more information, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) UAF 1.1 to UAF 1.2. Mapping solutions and issues' space=''].
